concepts.title: Multi-head attention and head roles
concepts.hook: Different heads learn different attention patterns; interpretability.

concepts.title: Cross-attention vs self-attention
concepts.hook: Self: within sequence; cross: between encoder and decoder outputs.

concepts.title: Grouped-query attention (GQA) and multi-query attention (MQA)
concepts.hook: KV heads < Q heads; reduces KV cache size in inference.

concepts.title: Efficient attention (FlashAttention, FlashAttention-2, FlashAttention-3)
concepts.hook: Hardware-aware IO-optimal attention; 2-3x faster on H100.

concepts.title: Sparse attention patterns (local, strided, longformer pattern)
concepts.hook: Reduce O(n^2) to O(n) for specific patterns; tradeoff: limited receptive field.

concepts.title: Rotary position embeddings (RoPE)
concepts.hook: Rotate query-key vectors; better length extrapolation than sinusoidal.

concepts.title: Relative position embeddings (ALiBi)
concepts.hook: Bias attention by relative distance; enables extreme length generalization.

concepts.title: RoPE interpolation and extrapolation
concepts.hook: Extend context length post-training; interpolate or truncate embeddings.

concepts.title: KV cache in autoregressive generation
concepts.hook: Store past K and V to avoid recomputation; but consumes GPU memory.

concepts.title: Paged attention (vLLM's PagedAttention)
concepts.hook: Treat KV cache as virtual memory; pages reduce fragmentation.

concepts.title: KV cache quantization and compression
concepts.hook: Store KV in INT4 or INT8; reduces memory at quantization cost.

concepts.title: KV cache eviction policies and memory limits
concepts.hook: Determine which past tokens to drop when memory full.

concepts.title: Extrapolation on longer sequences post-training
concepts.hook: Models train on 2K-4K tokens; serve 32K+; RoPE interpolation helps.

concepts.title: Ring attention and paged attention for long context
concepts.hook: Enable serving long contexts without quadratic memory.

concepts.title: Continued pre-training on longer sequences
concepts.hook: Fine-tune attention for longer contexts; improves but slow.
